nodes.name: Workflow Config

assignments.name: serperQueries
assignments.value: =["AI SaaS company site:linkedin.com/company","B2B SaaS startup hiring operations","recruitment agency workflow automation","agency scaling operations team","workflow-heavy SaaS company careers"]

nodes.notes: Set COGNIX_LEADS_SHEET_ID, GEMINI_API_KEY, SERPER_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in Windows env. Restart n8n after changes.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.searchQuery, num: 10, page: $json.page || 1, gl: "us", hl: "en" }) }}

nodes.name: IF Apify Enabled
nodes.notes: Skips Apify when APIFY_API_TOKEN is not set.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ queries: $json.company_name + " official website", maxPagesPerQuery: 1, resultsPerPage: 3 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { ...$json, apify_enriched: false } };
return { json: $json };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $("Attach Lead Context").first().json.website, formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 60000 }) }}

nodes.name: Gemini Lead Analysis
nodes.notes: Gemini 2.0 Flash via GEMINI_API_KEY query param.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { batch_continue: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$('Build Dedup Index').first().json, triggerFollowups: true } }];

nodes.name: Log High Intent Reply
nodes.notes: Default high-intent handling. No webhook required.

nodes.name: IF High Intent Webhook Enabled
nodes.notes: Optional. Set COGNIX_HIGH_INTENT_WEBHOOK_URL to POST alerts.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { loop: true } }];

parameters.content:
## CognixAI Outbound (Gemini)

Env: GEMINI_API_KEY, SERPER_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, COGNIX_LEADS_SHEET_ID, COGNIX_FROM_EMAIL
Optional: APIFY_API_TOKEN, COGNIX_HIGH_INTENT_WEBHOOK_URL, COGNIX_ERROR_WEBHOOK_URL

AI: Gemini 2.0 Flash generateContent
Triggers: Manual | Discovery Mon/Wed/Fri 06:00 | Follow-ups daily 09:00
